sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93394" key="sa/rph" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σάρπη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαρπίον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σάλπη</foreign> (q.v.), Sch.D.T.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.195</biblScope> </bibl> H.: <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαρπίς</orth> is expld. by <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαρπός</orth> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.466</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
